title: Ender Sins
description: An addon between Unusual End and Sons of Sins
body:
![logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/749/40/ender_sins_logo.png)

Ever wanted a cross-compatibility addons between Unusual End and Sons of Sins ? No ? Fine but here is this addon anyway x)

**Ender Sins is a small addon, adding new feature to Sons of Sins, related to Unusual End's mobs and items.**    
The mod is compatible with JEI, providing a complete description of each organ's purpose.

BOTH "UNUSUAL END" & "SONS OF SINS" ARE NEEDED TO USE THIS MOD !

### **New organs (used for necromancy) :**

(Entity is refering to the Entity created by necromancy using this organ)
Organ are only dropped when using a Sickle, and all organs can be eaten

**-  Golem Heart : Dropped by the Endstone Golem**
Grant Golem Aura & Fire Resistance to the Entity.The entity will have a chance of creating a powerful Shockwave when hurt, and be granted extra health.

**- Enderling Muscle : Dropped by the Undead Enderling**
Grant Faster movement speed to the Entity, and will make the Entity invisible when hurt; during this period, Attackers will stop targeting it.

**- Warped Ribs : Dropped by the Bolok and Bluk**
Grant more Armor points and Knockback resistance.

**- Firefly Muscle : Dropped by the Ender Firefly**
Grant Night Vision to nearby Players. The Firefly Vision ability will also make the Entity's target glow

**- Sticky Muscle : Dropped by Enderblobs and Enderbulbs**
Grant Knockback Resistance and more Attack Knockback to the Entity. It will knock away the Attacker when the Entity is hurt

**- Shiny Muscle : Crafted**
Grant Regeneration to the Entity's Owner if nearby. The Crystal Regeneration ability will grant an high Regeneration buff to the Entity if not hurt for a short period (5 seconds).


![organs](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/749/56/1.png)

### **New item :**

**- Ancient Sickle** :
A slower but more powerful sickle, granting a bit of additonal attack range.

### **New Enchantment :**
**- Hooked Blade (I - II) - Sickle Enchantment** : 
Grant the "Hooked" effect to the Victim, lowering its attack range, and slowing it.



Wait, this mod is made with Mcreator ?

-> Yes, it's mainly made with Mcreator, but not only. Also it don't mean that i don't have any java knowledge, so if you encounter an issue, please report it, instead, like some, of thinking that i couldn't fix it !


You can put Ender Sins in your modpacks. 
I'm also open to suggestions / ideas in the comments !
Also check my other mods, or join my team's discord server :O
